description: An object representing different event types in Axon
label: Event
name: c_event

properties.description: Will the clients automatically start this task if no other task is available
properties.label: Auto Start
properties.name: c_auto_start

properties.description: Property to more easily track the specific event, ad hoc & scheduled only
properties.label: Recurrence Number
properties.name: c_recurrence_number

properties.description: Task to be performed in this event
properties.label: Task
properties.name: c_task

properties.description: The assignment that manages the creation and some updates of this event
properties.label: Task Assignment
properties.name: c_task_assignment

properties.description: The completed response for this event
properties.label: Task Response
properties.name: c_task_response

properties.description: Have all the selected dependencies been met for this event
properties.label: All Dependencies Met
properties.name: c_all_dependencies_met

properties.description: Will the clients automatically start this task if no other task is available
properties.label: Auto Start
properties.name: c_auto_start

properties.description: An array of dependencies that manage this events availability
properties.label: Dependencies
properties.name: c_dependencies

properties.description: Property to track if the parent criteria is met
properties.label: Dependency Met
properties.name: c_dependency_met

properties.description: Unique Key for export purposes
properties.label: Key
properties.name: c_key

properties.description: Reference to the parent event
properties.label: Parent Event
properties.name: c_parent_event

properties.description: Hash that reference the parent event
properties.label: Parent Event Hash
properties.name: c_parent_hash

properties.description: An enum of dependency types: missed, complete, complete:success, complete:failure
properties.label: Type
properties.name: c_type

properties.description: The time (in minutes) from when this task event becomes available till it becomes unavailable again
properties.label: Duration
properties.name: c_duration

properties.description: The time (in minutes) from when the parent criteria was met after which this task event becomes available
properties.label: Parent Offset Time
properties.name: c_parent_offset_time

properties.description: Task to be performed in this event
properties.label: Task
properties.name: c_task

properties.description: The assignment that manages the creation and some updates of this event
properties.label: Task Assignment
properties.name: c_task_assignment

properties.description: The completed response for this event
properties.label: Task Response
properties.name: c_task_response

properties.description: Will the clients automatically start this task if no other task is available
properties.label: Auto Start
properties.name: c_auto_start

properties.description: Property to more easily track the specific event, ad hoc & scheduled only
properties.label: Recurrence Number
properties.name: c_recurrence_number

properties.description: Task to be performed in this event
properties.label: Task
properties.name: c_task

properties.description: The assignment that manages the creation and some updates of this event
properties.label: Task Assignment
properties.name: c_task_assignment

properties.description: The completed response for this event
properties.label: Task Response
properties.name: c_task_response

properties.description: Is this event complete
properties.label: Completed
properties.name: c_completed

properties.description: Hash of event
properties.label: Event Hash
properties.name: c_hash

properties.description: The time when the list was last regenerated
properties.label: Last Updated
properties.name: c_last_updated

properties.description: Is this event missed
properties.label: Missed

properties.description: The datetime when the event was missed
